titles.title: God Knows My Heart Is Pure

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God knows my heart Is pure And I strive to do some good Though temptations are so hard to overcome I’ll rejoice on that day when I'll hear my Saviour say Lay your burdens down my child, welcome home

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’m so troubled and so weary that I don’t know what to do But the Lord said that He’d see me through All the road that I have travelled has been long and so dark But the Lord knows what is in my heart.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, Satan has a power to tempt a sinner man Till he’s caught up in a snare he can’t undo If you hear the gentle whisper of the Master’s voice above I know that the Lord will see you through.
